messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Give me ur number if you want me to start planning a date and give me ur snap if you want me to kiss ur neck while I pin you against the wall

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I hope that answers our predicament

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Can I shave your mustache on our first date

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: be honest <NAME> how many guys have you said this to

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: It was the bong rips that got me

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: it was the glasses for me

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: So can I shave your mustache or not

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: hmm if i say yes does that mean you'll go out with me?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: wow. it's a gamble. The house always wins 😩

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: as a compromise i'll let you shave my eyebrows. how's that?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: No. Your eyebrows are fine but the mustache isn't

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: this is an assault on my character 😔 rethinking my very nature rn

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Then my job here is done

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: well. can't say it was nice knowing you

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Damn girl are you a microwave? Cause mmmmmmmmmmm

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: If I am, are you cold food? Cause I wanna shove you in my box and warm you up

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: That was filth and not representative of me as a person

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Even van gogh would have dropped the brush looking at u

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: If van gogh saw u, he wouldn't have dropped the brush, he would have painted forever

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: What's your favorite kind of rock? I've always liked those flat circular ones that are good for winging at stuff

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Unless by "I've always got a pocket full of rocks" you meant that you're a crack dealer, in which case hey I don't judge

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: No not a rack dealer 🤣🤣 legit rocks 🤣🤣

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I get it, you aren't comfortable telling me that kinda stuff yet. It's okay we have time. Jasper is the kinda rock that I really want to bite but I have to tell myself NO you cannot bite rocks!

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: When was the last time you cried?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Not because they're weak, but because they've been strong for too long

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I'm feeling like a serrated blade is the play here

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Would you be comfortable going for a hike? I'd be pretty easy to stash my body

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Will you buy me Taco Bell after

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Will you buy me Taco Bell after?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I'll blow u a kiss after

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I'd prefer the taco bell, I could blow you a kiss after

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: I'm sorry I'm never on here

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I feel like I'm being set up here but what is nerd neck

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: i could go for some nerd neck

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Ya I was waiting for you to ask a question.

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Yeah no. Might have to take that back. Why would you even ask that?

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I really need you to do SOMETHING to me tonight bc tbis is bad

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Please tell me that wasn't <NAME> texting that

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Actually I like almost everything about you

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Maybe we could smile at each other in person sometime this weekend

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I think that'd be a great idea

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Do you have a favorite flavor of crayon? I've always been partial to cyan myself

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: A classic. Good choice. When you're not eating crayons, what do you like to get up to?

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Spend time with my dog and family, get outside, try a new restaurant or brewery/winery :) sniff glue sometimes

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Personally I prefer kilo city but I get it

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: Right next to pound town. I'd have to take you there

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: My alcoholic stepmoms name was Bronwyn

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I'm sorry to hear you have such a bad association with the name. I am neither an alcoholic nor am I bagging your dad

messages.speaker: B
messages.text: My dad's short I don't think you would be interested

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: I have nothing against short kings 🤷🏻‍♀️

messages.speaker: A
messages.text: Damn. Send me his number actually. He sounds like an actual babe
